observations: Ground-mounted commercial/utility-scale solar array visible — multiple rows of large panels on fixed-tilt steel racking across open paddock.
This appears to be an existing or reference site rather than a residential rooftop survey — likely used for benchmarking or client education purposes.
Panel orientation appears north-facing (consistent with Southern Hemisphere best practice) at an estimated fixed tilt of 20–30 degrees.
Sky shows significant cumulus cloud cover — partial shading conditions present at time of survey capture.
No workers, PPE, tools, or customer interactions visible in frame.

installQualityFlags.message: Vegetation (grass/weeds) beneath and around array rows appears unmanaged — long grass can cause shading on lower cell rows and create fire risk in dry conditions. Confirm site maintenance plan is in scope.
Row spacing cannot be confirmed from this angle — verify inter-row distance meets minimum winter solstice shadow clearance for this latitude to avoid inter-row shading losses.
Ground condition appears soft/grassed — confirm soil bearing capacity and footing depth are adequate for racking ground screws or ballast footings, especially given visible clay-like rural soil.

timeOnTaskNote: Site survey phase — no active installation underway. Capture of existing array layout is appropriate for benchmarking. Ensure survey checklist covers shading analysis, grid connection point, metering, and access tracks before leaving site.
nextSteps: Walk the perimeter of each array row and record inter-row spacing, tilt angle, and orientation with a compass or solar pathfinder app — document for shading loss modelling.
Check and photograph the cable trench or conduit runs back to the inverter/switchboard location, confirming DC cable protection and any exposed conduit integrity.
Note vegetation height and density beneath arrays and flag a site maintenance requirement in the survey report — include in client scope-of-works or exclusion clause.

visualCallouts.label: Long grass risk
visualCallouts.message: Grass under the front row is tall — flag for maintenance to prevent lower-cell shading and fire risk.

visualCallouts.label: Check row spacing
visualCallouts.message: Confirm inter-row gap eliminates winter shading — measure from rear of front row to base of next row.

visualCallouts.label: Shading conditions
visualCallouts.message: Heavy cloud present — note time and cloud cover in your survey log for irradiance context.

spokenCue.say: Measure inter-row spacing and log that long grass for maintenance.
